title: Unfun
description: Make your game significantly less fun!
body:
Worsen your gaming experience with the following additions:
- Dismemberment combat
- 4 new skills to level up: mining, fighting, crafting, building
- Carving, chiseling, and casting to produce tools
- Token items for each max-level villager.
